attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME, ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.ORG_ID, ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT ,
ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX
WHERE ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
AND
ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME=EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT ,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.ORG_ID,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.COMMENTS,
CASE WHEN ORG_ID = 2290 AND COALESCE(ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.COMMENTS,'UNK') LIKE '%Duplicar fatura de factura original%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SECONDARY_INV_FLG 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX
WHERE ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
AND
ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME=EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME)
